_doc: Potential definitions (1-5). Text descriptions from wiki; structured effects to be added.

potentials.description: 战技非常规路亚触发恢复技力效果时，额外恢复10点技力

effects.note: extra trueSP when skill triggers SP recovery (cold consume). NOT refund — generates ult charge.

potentials.name: 咸鳞翻身

potentials.description: 连携技凿孔底钓术成功钓起珍鳞后，全队攻击力+15%，持续10秒，该效果无法叠加
potentials.name: 愿者上钩

potentials.description: 终结技大鳞，上钩！所需的终结技能量-15%
potentials.name: 疯狂钓组

potentials.description: 终结技大鳞，上钩！命中生命值低于50%的目标时，伤害倍率提升至原本的1.5倍。
potentials.name: 特大鳞讯
